name: imperium-of-guilliman
description: Imperium of Guilliman — personal Warhammer 40k themed agent-coding marketplace bound by the Codex Astartes. Ticket-pipeline agents, ticket-* skills, MCP servers, install scripts. Portable across machines.

plugins.name: ultramarines
plugins.description: Codex Astartes for coding. Ticket-pipeline agents (librarian, inquisitor, techmarine, chapter-master, apothecary, tech-priest), ticket-* skills, /ticket-pipeline orchestrator.

plugins.name: adeptus-mechanicus
plugins.description: Machine cult. MCP server config (jira, newrelic, notebooklm) sourced from environment variables. Disable when offline.
